title: Predicted false ASK: 'not specified' matches inside 'not specified yet but already inferred'
predicted_basis: _classify_text ASK branch matches 'not specified' inside 'not specified yet but already inferred', overriding the more accurate later signal (spec FR-004 predicted trap family)
failure_mode: substring trap: 'not specified' matches inside 'not specified yet but already inferred'; ASK branch fires even though the value is supplied and the work is assigned (FR-004)

rationale: The trigger resolves its own ambiguity in the same sentence (the inferred value 5 is supplied) and assigns concrete work, so no clarification is needed — the correct verdict is SPEAK.
